description_long: This is a matching set of brown leather recliners, consisting of a three-seater sofa and a single armchair. Both pieces feature high, slightly winged backrests with subtle button tufting and generously padded armrests. The upholstery is a rich, dark brown leather with a smooth, glossy finish, giving the set a classic and luxurious appearance. The seats are deep and plush, designed for comfort, and the legs are short and sturdy, likely made of wood. The overall silhouette is traditional, with rounded edges and a robust build. No visible reclining mechanisms or footrests are apparent from the exterior.
description: A classic brown leather recliner set with a three-seater sofa and a single armchair, featuring high tufted backs and padded armrests.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth and padding of the armrests and backrests, with both the sofa and armchair aligned.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tall, continuous backrests and the smooth, uninterrupted leather surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, again emphasizing the armrest and backrest thickness.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the button-tufted backrests, seat cushions, and the overall inviting appearance of the set.
attribute_armrest_design: The armrests are wide, rounded, and heavily padded, covered in smooth brown leather, and extend seamlessly from the seat to the front edge.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrests are single, continuous pieces with subtle button tufting, providing a unified and supportive surface.
